ha741ab18g0683g4497ga3b3g9672f9b81e53: A fine evening, don't you think?
habd8b04fg7ed9g4285ga5e0g9356b353f2f4: The moonlight shines warmly on us. The breeze caresses our faces.
h6484c623g1608g40d7g851bg8a46198d71fd: Would that I were doing battle up there, among the Tears.
hb5592796g7cc9g495eg9075g398db9bf3213: What do you mean by 'the Tears'?
h4d04174bg632dg44d1gabccg91b0e1842c07: Look above. Watch the moon cross the sky.
hd6c476edgc2c9g4922gba30gd8539616cd59: The Tears follow behind it. Rocky bodies tumbling through the Sea of Night. One of them is my crèche: K'liir.
hc15019acgbdc4g43f9g91c1g169b55a9fe15: Are all githyanki from the Tears?
h90083254gcb5fg48b1g8831g19af01cf57a1: Your curiosity is to be commended.
h1c0e12afga53fg4ea1gb517g8772f6660ddc: Githyanki are hatched in crèches all throughout Realmspace. K'liir is one of many.
hb6c3beb2g7691g414fg922fg946d4c182492: It's there I first saw a kith'rak mount a red dragon. Where I slit my cousins' throats at the varsh's command.
h9c2a4dd0g8aeag4b46g95f2gf6479467a99a: But enough of this. You are wasting your resting time. Come dawn, we resume our search for a crèche.
h14aaf37fg7568g437cga84cg30e8d959a8fe: It must be quite a shock, to leave your crèche behind and arrive here.
hc1591d51gc3b2g41acg872cgbab1db155a6c: Do you think me so sheltered?
h3fcc69a0g5a8eg4c94g917bg21fead4a69db: My entire clutch battled beholders deep within the Eye of the Sky.
h18dda143g9a96g4312gad16g3e3b85d40f76: We infiltrated a neogi Spelljammer and laid waste to its crew.
hbab590bfgd549g4b31g9bb5ga837c20fc1bc: The Tears span Toril's sky, vin'iisk. There is more to this realm than this grassy pebble.
hfb7771c9gdac4g454dg8782gde4996bbcef8: Did you only train within the Tears?
h97588beegeb23g4825g96e2g8b6b10cd088a: My entire clutch battled beholders within the Eye of the Sky's tunnels.
he76f4188g4bbcg40b0g93a2g3455f96ad44b: We infiltrated a neogi spelljammer and laid waste to its crew.
h395f1fb5g5206g463cg9d28g172c02cb00ce: The Tears span Toril's sky. There is more to the realm than this grassy pebble, kin.
h18bd2a24g05a7g4aebg918cg273c3a36cc8c: The Tears span Toril's sky. There is more to the realm than this grassy pebble, vin'iisk.
h2a3fa686gb6e5g4681g8371g61aa36f650af: You mean you come from up there? In the sky?
hae9e5629gb82fg4b7dgbcaeg431b8da9c3bb: You are too easily astonished. There is more to this realm than this grassy pebble.
h3b880ea7ge7a7g4beagba99g2888de061b4a: Perhaps Faerûn has its value. You shouldn't discount it just yet.
he0e0f53cg698fg4fe8ga7ebg0d59b3994c01: Faerûn isn't so bad. Give it a chance.
he1bd3953gbb38g47d2g8eaeg698ba804f2c3: I see naught but cowards cowering in their groves and grottos.
h31559452g6e66g405dg919bg3e5b2c81f0b1: Flowering meadows and fecund soil have softened their minds and muscles.
h27381294gf8b2g4297gb5dcg78f287359d45: They rely on strangers' swords, when they should be forging their own.
h6d48287cg80ebg4fe1ga732g2bb9060d7781: You want to do battle up where?
h83251551g052ag47efg85b2g2845f4fc0094: The Tears of Selûne? They mar the sky - I'd extinguish them if I could.
h66394913g9ed7g4dafg8ad4g0ac39ea5c63f: Extinguish the Tears? Your dedication to your goddess blinds you to their import.
h4642529eg5541g40b7ga3cdg73d6f283dbb9: Look above, to the Sea of Night.
hedbe494bgac0eg4566ga9ddgdf0899b3ecb4: Should you be fortunate, you may see Crèche K'liir tumble past.
hee498c6cg2360g485bg9c73g6b611c7dfe92: The Tears of Selûne, you mean?
ha9eb706fg042bg4df2gb3a9ga520ca97952d: Yes. Rocky bodies named after a false goddess.
h70ea961bg78acg41d8gbe49gc59e7b36e4ff: The Tears of Selûne? I've spent many a night observing these celestial bodies.
hf2bb4fe9g8dcag4454g82adgc5e33ecd10ee: Perhaps we may see them this eve. Look above, to the Sea of Night.
h1f77521bgc550g436agaae9g5eb503c30915: You are wise not to waste your resting time. Come dawn, we resume our search for a crèche.
